arts.ttl: Tottenham vs AZ Alkmaar predicted as Europa League quarter-finals fate decided

arts.ttl: Fanciful dream to sign Destiny Udogie likely to be blown apart by Tottenham
arts.sum: Destiny Udogie has proved to be an important signing for Tottenham since he arrived from Udinese in the summer of 2022. He has now played 57 times in all competitions for the London giants, who have seen him return to action after a hamstring injury in the past few weeks.
